capabilities_used.evidence: 几乎所有交易相关推文都围绕 Elliott Wave 展开，如“$Gold on the yearly timeframe continues to follow the classic Elliott Wave structure, After completing a powerful Wave III, a limited corrective move is expected within Wave IV near the 38.2% Fibonacci...”以及多条“Elliott Wave Analysis – $GOLD / $BTCUSD / $EURUSD”。
明确反复用 61.8% 回撤位定位拐点，如“corrective wave (2) seems to have ended precisely at the classic 61.8% Fibonacci retracement level”以及“deep correction toward the 61.8% Fibonacci level”。
直接使用假突破叙事，如“$EURUSD Forecast & Analysis ... made a false breakout above 1.1919, completing wave b”以及其方法里常把 wave b/假突破视为陷阱后继续主趋势。
有专门教育型推文“Pin Bar Candle: The Secret to Strong Reversals! Do You Use It In Your Trading?”，说明他把单根 K 线拒绝信号当作反转确认工具。
提供的推文里均线不是核心，但他会做趋势切换式确认；只是相比波浪/Fib 明显是次要工具，因此权重较低。

多次对 GOLD/BTC 做末升浪衰竭判断，如“Gold has reached the 5th wave (V) after a historical rally. The next expectation: a strong corrective decline”以及“completed five-wave impulsive structure peaking at 124,474, followed by an Irregular Flat correction”。
虽未直接频繁点名 three drives，但他高度依赖对称推进、波段分形和终结结构，和三推动/延展目标投射的思路接近；属于弱使用。
推文里有“小实体替代大实体”作为趋势变化线索：“When the Trend Is Up & We See Big Candles, Then The Price Starts Forming Smaller Candles… Two Possibilities: 1. A Trend Reversal Is Coming 2. Low Liquidity”，属于 K 线衰竭观察。
大量分析本质是在识别 impulsive down move / corrective bounce，如“$GOLD Is Expected To Plunge Towards The $3190 Level Within The Next Few Hours”与“bearish wave ... drop toward $95,xxx”。
同样也频繁做顺趋势看多波段，如“potential continuation of wave (v) of (iii)”和“expectation of a price increase to reach wave (iii)”，说明他是先判定趋势阶段，再嵌套波浪。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Elliott Corrective Wave Counting
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Identifies corrective structures such as wave II/IV pullbacks, zigzags, flats, irregular flats, and complex corrections, then projects the next impulsive leg or deeper retracement.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 识别 wave II/IV 回调、zigzag、flat、irregular flat 等修正结构，并据此推演下一段推动浪或更深回撤。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: “currently trading within wave (c) of the corrective wave (IV)”；“wave (iii) has been completed, and a retracement within wave (iv) is expected”；“followed by an Irregular Flat correction (a–b–c)”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Elliott Leading/Ending Diagonal
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Uses leading and ending diagonals as early-trend initiation or terminal-exhaustion structures inside Elliott Wave counts.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把引导楔形和终结楔形作为 Elliott Wave 计数中的趋势起始或末端衰竭结构。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 他单独发过“Leading Diagonal In Elliott Wave Theory”与“Ending diagonal in Elliott Wave Theory”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: ICT PD Array Violation Rule
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: ICT PD Array 三层失守规则
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Tracks stacked ICT PD arrays; when three nearby arrays fail or are violated, the setup is considered structurally compromised and stops/partials must be adjusted.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 跟踪连续排列的 ICT PD Arrays；当相邻三层阵列被跌破/破坏时，认为结构失效，需要调整止损和减仓。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: “3 PD Array Rule ✔️ ‘When 3 PD Arrays are violated, your ass is next.’ ... Learn where to keep yours stops, partial according to ICT”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Candle Compression Exhaustion
new_capabilities_proposed.description: After a strong directional trend marked by large candles, a sequence of smaller candles is treated as either reversal warning or liquidity compression before a breakout.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 趋势中先出现大实体推进，随后连续缩小 K 线实体，被视为反转预警或流动性压缩后的爆发前兆。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: “When the Trend Is Up & We See Big Candles, Then The Price Starts Forming Smaller Candles… Two Possibilities: 1. A Trend Reversal Is Coming 2. Low Liquidity”。

personal_quirks.quote: Wave 3 is coming... Don’t miss it!
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 偏好捕捉最有爆发力的主升/主跌段，而不是只做均值回归。

personal_quirks.quote: We Said $3190, They Said We Were Dreaming…  Now $GOLD Is Walking Down, Step By Step!
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 喜欢提前给明确目标位，并在事后用目标兑现来强化方法可信度。

personal_quirks.quote: Pin Bar Candle: The Secret to Strong Reversals!  Do You Use It In Your Trading?
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 虽然主框架是波浪，但会用单根反转 K 线做战术级确认。

personal_quirks.quote: When the Trend Is Up & We See Big Candles, Then The Price Starts Forming Smaller Candles…  ▪️Two Possibilities: 1. A Trend Reversal Is Coming 2. Low Liquidity
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 他把动能衰减先体现在 K 线实体压缩上，而不是先看宏观或链上。

personal_quirks.quote: 3 PD Array Rule ✔️  “When 3 PD Arrays are violated, your ass is next.”
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 一旦关键结构连续失守，就认为交易前提无效，应该收缩风险。

unique_traits: 他本质上是一个以 Elliott Wave 为核心叙事引擎的图表派，几乎所有市场结论都被包装成推动浪/修正浪/终结浪的结构判断。与很多泛 TA 账号不同，他会反复把 61.8% Fibonacci、对称波段和具体浪级编号绑定在一起，形成非常模板化但可复制的分析产出。另一个明显特征是账号内容噪音极大，交易推文只占一部分，因此更像“内容流里夹带高辨识度 Elliott Wave 帖子”的创作者型交易员。

high_conviction_phrases: setting the stage for a strong bullish reversal
